steps.title: Identify what the goal requires
steps.content: The student wants to “specify which countries the Danube River passes through.” The notes provide exactly what's needed: two countries mentioned—Hungary and Romania. This is the decisive signal.

steps.title: Find the choice with that information
steps.content: Choice A directly includes both: “passes through both Hungary and Romania.” Choices B, C, and D focus on other details from the notes—world and European rankings, length—without mentioning any country. This matches choice A — A is correct.
